event_description: I have no reliable, specific recollection from my training data of Brown-Forman Corporation (BF-A/BF-B) ever announcing an accounting restatement, an Item 4.02 non-reliance determination, a material financial-reporting misstatement, an SEC accounting investigation, or a finance-executive departure tied to financial-reporting issues. Brown-Forman is generally known as a stable, long-standing spirits company (Jack Daniel's, etc.) with a conservative financial reporting history, but I cannot confirm the complete absence of such an event with certainty—only that I do not recall one.
